page: Microsoft Azure HX176-24rs is an x86_64 architecture server powered by dedicated Intel processors and virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. This instance features 24 dedicated vCPUs paired with 1408.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 58.67 GB per core.

The server is equipped with 4332 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. Additionally, the HX176-24rs is RDMA capable, enabling low-latency, high-throughput networking for clustered environments. It does not include any GPU accelerators.

Given the massive memory allocation relative to the vCPU count, this server offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring large in-memory footprints without requiring a proportional scaling of compute cores. The hardware profile is suited for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, and high-performance computing node configurations.
description: Microsoft Azure HX176-24rs is an x86_64 architecture server designed for memory-intensive workloads, virtualized on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 24 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 1408.0 GB of system memory, providing a high density of 58.67 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 4332 GB of local storage, supports Premium Storage, and is RDMA capable for high-throughput, low-latency networking. Lacking GPU acceleration, this server is optimized for workloads that demand massive memory capacity and fast storage access rather than parallel graphics processing. The combination of high memory density, local storage, and RDMA capability makes this server suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and clustered high-performance computing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HX176-24rs is an x86_64 server featuring 24 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1408.0 GB of RAM, 4332 GB of local storage, and RDMA capabilities for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure HX176-24rs is an x86_64 server with 24 dedicated vCPUs, 1408 GB RAM, and 4332 GB local storage, optimized for memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server featuring dedicated Intel processors, massive RAM capacity, local storage, and low-latency RDMA networking capabilities.

1408.0 GB of system memory providing 58.67 GB per core

Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads
